"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 20:20 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem794_filter_real_claude_response.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='real_claude_response_present':
    status='process_real_claude_response_next'; next_action='parse real Claude response and produce agreed protocol'
else:
    status='continue_real_runtime_dispatch_repair'; next_action='diagnose why dispatch processor/Claude runtime still not producing real response'
state={'bem':'BEM-795','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem795_route_after_real_claude_filter.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem795_route_after_real_claude_filter.md').write_text('# BEM-795 | Route After Real Claude Filter | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem795_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-795'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem795_route_after_real_claude_filter.json','governance/reports/bem795_route_after_real_claude_filter.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem795_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after filtering real Claude response from fallback/blocker files')
